title: Trinidad and Tobago Statement in Respect of Beneficial Ownership of a Firm (Form 1)
description: The Office of the Registrar General's Form 1, "Statement in Respect of Beneficial Ownership of a Firm", prescribed under section 20C(1),(2) of the Partnership Act, Chap. 81:02, and filed pursuant to the Registration of Business Names Act, Chap. 82:85, by a single declarant disclosing their own or another person's beneficial-ownership status in a registered firm/business name. Advances Trinidad and Tobago's Business Formation vertical (Passport, DMV, and Taxes already published via tt/imd/passport-application-first-adult, tt/mowt/driving-permit-application, and tt/ird/individual-income-tax-return). This cycle re-examined the two Business Formation candidates CATALOG.md's Known Gaps had banked since GOV-4568/GOV-4568-adjacent scouting and found both mischaracterized on closer reading: the actual Application for Registration by an Individual (Form No. 1 under the Registration of Business Names Act) is filed exclusively through legalaffairs.gov.tt's login-gated CRA e-filing portal with no downloadable static form, and the other banked "Form 6" candidate (Statement - Form 6.pdf) is in fact a thin 2-field Statement of Change in Particulars (amendment, not initial registration) under section 8 of the Act. This schema instead models Form1_P.pdf (also on legalaffairs.gov.tt), a distinct and substantive beneficial-ownership disclosure statement genuinely required of every partnership/firm business name under the Partnership Act's 2024-in-force beneficial-ownership amendments; see the document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full re-scoping rationale. Models the three mutually exclusive declarant tracks the form itself provides — an individual partner (Section 3), a corporation that is a partner, completed by one of its directors or secretary (Section 4), and an individual beneficial owner who is not a partner (Section 5) — plus the common firm-identification header and signature block. This schema does not file the statement itself; the live source and the Office of the Registrar General's own current requirements are always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Trinidad and Tobago or its Office of the Registrar General.

source.documentRef: Form 1, "Statement in Respect of Beneficial Ownership of a Firm", The Partnership Act, Chap. 81:02 [Section 20C(1),(2)], Office of the Registrar General, 4 pages (3 form pages plus a printed Instructions page), flat (non-AcroForm) native PDF.

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: the re-scoping of CATALOG.md's banked Business Formation candidates, source fetch/hash, extraction method, the single-declarant/single-row-table document structure, the three mutually-exclusive declarant-track discriminator (not itself a printed field), and the disclosed decision to exclude Section 4's nested corporate-officer identification sub-cases beyond a single officer.

steps.title: Items 1-2 — Firm Identification and Declarant Type
Item 4.1 — Particulars of Partner (Corporation) and its Director/Secretary
Item 5.1 — Particulars of the Beneficial Owner (Not a Partner)
Item 5.2 — Beneficial Owner Status (Not a Partner)

fields.name: businessNumber
fields.label: Business No.
fields.description: The business number set out in the Certificate of Registration, per the form's own Instructions (Items 1, 2). Left blank if a business number has not yet been assigned.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 2 — "Business No. ______" (Pursuant to Registration of Business Names Act, Chap. 82:85)

fields.name: declarantCategory
fields.label: Declarant category
fields.description: Not itself a printed field: the form provides three mutually exclusive sections (3, 4, 5), each completed by a different class of declarant — "a partner of the firm who is an individual" (Item 3), "a partner of the firm who is a corporation" completing on behalf of the corporation (Item 4), or "an individual (natural person) who is a beneficial owner of the firm and is not a partner" (Item 5), per the form's own printed Instructions. Modelled as an explicit discriminator selecting which of the three sections below applies to this filing, the same pattern this registry uses for other forms whose applicable section is implied by context rather than printed as its own selectable field (e.g. zm/pacra/company-incorporation's isBodyCorporate).

fields.name: individualPartnerName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: First name(s), middle name(s) and surname(s), no abbreviations, per the form's own Instructions, Item 3.1(a).

fields.name: individualPartnerIdentificationType
fields.label: Form of Identification
fields.description: "whether the national identification card, driver's permit or passport", per the form's own Instructions, Item 3.1(b).
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.1, "Particulars of Partners" table — "Form of Identification"

fields.name: individualPartnerIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Identification Number
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.1, "Particulars of Partners" table — "Identification Number"

fields.name: individualPartnerIdentificationCountryOfIssue
fields.label: Country of Issue
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.1, "Particulars of Partners" table — "Country of Issue"

fields.name: individualPartnerIdentificationExpiryDate
fields.label: Expiry Date
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.1, "Particulars of Partners" table — "Expiry Date"

fields.name: individualPartnerIsBeneficialOwner
fields.label: I am / I am not a beneficial owner of the Firm
fields.description: True selects "I am a beneficial owner of the Firm for the following reason(s)"; false selects "I am not a beneficial owner of the Firm and, the following person is a beneficial owner of the Firm on the basis indicated", per the form's own two mutually exclusive radio options.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2 — "I, the above-named Partner, confirm that — (Select the option that is applicable) o I am a beneficial owner... / o I am not a beneficial owner..."

fields.name: individualPartnerReasonIsPartner
fields.label: Reason: a natural person who is a partner of the firm
fields.description: One of three selectable reasons a partner may check off in support of being a beneficial owner; the form permits selecting more than one.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2 — "□ a natural person who is a partner of the firm;"

fields.name: individualPartnerReasonExercisesControl
fields.label: Reason: a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2 — "□ a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm, the particulars of which are —"

fields.name: individualPartnerControlParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the ultimate effective control
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2, blank lines beneath the "ultimate effective control" reason

fields.name: individualPartnerReasonOnWhoseBehalf
fields.label: Reason: a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2 — "□ a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted, the particulars of which are —"

fields.name: individualPartnerTransactionParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the transaction
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Item 3.2, blank lines beneath the "on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted" reason

fields.name: otherOwnerName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Per the form's own Instructions, Item 3.2(c): where the individual partner is not a beneficial owner, the particulars of the individual(s) known by the partner to be a beneficial owner of the firm.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1-2, Item 3.2, "the following person is a beneficial owner" table — "Name"

fields.name: otherOwnerAddress
fields.label: Address
fields.sourceRef: Page 1-2, Item 3.2, "the following person is a beneficial owner" table — "Address"

fields.name: otherOwnerNationality
fields.label: Nationality
fields.sourceRef: Page 1-2, Item 3.2, "the following person is a beneficial owner" table — "Nationality"

fields.name: otherOwnerOccupation
fields.label: Occupation
fields.sourceRef: Page 1-2, Item 3.2, "the following person is a beneficial owner" table — "Occupation"

fields.name: otherOwnerReasonIsPartner
fields.label: Nature of Beneficial Interest: a natural person who is a partner of the firm
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Nature of Beneficial Interest (Select the option that is applicable)" — "a natural person who is a partner of the firm;"

fields.name: otherOwnerReasonExercisesControl
fields.label: Nature of Beneficial Interest: a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Nature of Beneficial Interest" — "a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm, the particulars of which are"

fields.name: otherOwnerControlParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the ultimate effective control
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Nature of Beneficial Interest" table, control-particulars cell

fields.name: otherOwnerReasonOnWhoseBehalf
fields.label: Nature of Beneficial Interest: a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Nature of Beneficial Interest" — "a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted, the particulars of which are"

fields.name: otherOwnerTransactionParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the transaction
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, "Nature of Beneficial Interest" table, transaction-particulars cell

fields.name: corporateName
fields.label: Corporate Name
fields.description: No abbreviations, per the form's own Instructions, Item 4.1(a).

fields.name: corporateStatus
fields.label: Status
fields.description: E.g. limited or unlimited liability corporation incorporated under the laws of Trinidad and Tobago, or elsewhere, per the form's own Instructions, Item 4.1(c).

fields.name: corporateOfficerName
fields.label: Name of Officer of the Corporation
fields.description: First given name(s), middle name(s), and surname(s), no abbreviations, per the form's own Instructions, Item 4.1(d).
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Item 4.1 table — "Name of Officer of the Corporation"

fields.name: corporateOfficerTitle
fields.label: Title of Officer of the Corporation
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Item 4.1 table — "Title of Officer of the Corporation", "Director" / "Secretary" checkbox columns

fields.name: corporateBeneficialOwnerName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: Per section 20A(d)(i) of the Partnership Act, as determined pursuant to section 337A of the Companies Act, Chap. 81:01, or section 4 of the Securities Act, Chap. 83:02, per the form's own Instructions, Item 4.2.

fields.name: nonPartnerOwnerName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: First name(s), middle name(s) and surname(s), no abbreviations, per the form's own Instructions, Item 5.1(a).

fields.name: nonPartnerOwnerReasonExercisesControl
fields.label: Reason: a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm
fields.description: Unlike Item 3.2 (individual partner) and the "Nature of Beneficial Interest" table, this declarant track offers only two reasons — "a natural person who is a partner of the firm" is not printed here, since Section 5 is by definition completed by someone who is not a partner.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Item 5.2 — "□ a natural person who exercises ultimate effective control over the firm, the particulars of which are —"

fields.name: nonPartnerOwnerControlParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the ultimate effective control
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Item 5.2, blank lines beneath the "ultimate effective control" reason

fields.name: nonPartnerOwnerReasonOnWhoseBehalf
fields.label: Reason: a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Item 5.2 — "□ a natural person on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted, the particulars of which are —"

fields.name: nonPartnerOwnerTransactionParticulars
fields.label: Particulars of the transaction
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, Item 5.2, blank lines beneath the "on whose behalf a transaction is being conducted" reason

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Dated
fields.description: Printed in prose form ("Dated the ___ day of ___, ___") rather than as a labelled date box; modelled directly as a single date value, the same convention this registry applies to other legal-document dating lines with no distinct AcroForm field (e.g. tt/mowt/driving-permit-application's applicationDate).

fields.name: signatureOfDeclarant
fields.label: Signature
fields.description: The signature line above the printed "Name:"/"Title:" labels. Per the form's own Instructions, "Signature": the person making the statement shall sign the form; in the case of a partner that is a corporation, the director or secretary completing the statement shall sign on behalf of the corporation, indicating the capacity in which they are signing.

fields.name: declarantTitle
fields.label: Title
fields.description: The capacity in which the declarant signs, e.g. "Partner", "Director", "Secretary", or "Beneficial Owner", per the form's own Instructions under "Signature".
